Container.Name: StandardNotes-LocalStack
Container.Overview:
LocalStack companion container for the Standard Notes self-hosted backend on Unraid. Provides the SNS / SQS endpoints that the upstream standardnotes/server image expects to find at "localstack:4566".
REQUIRED companion for the official Standard Notes server image — it mirrors the upstream docker-compose.example.yml. Without it, StandardNotesServer's worker logs (/var/lib/server/logs/files-worker.log) repeat "SQSError: SQS receive message failed: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND localstack" and background jobs fail in a loop, destabilising sync. Skip this template ONLY if you have explicit alternative SNS / SQS endpoints configured upstream.
HOSTNAME RESOLUTION — THE SERVER MUST RESOLVE "localstack": The official standardnotes/server image resolves the literal hostname "localstack" (port 4566). The container name in this template is "StandardNotes-LocalStack" for clarity in the Unraid UI, but the StandardNotesServer container MUST still be able to resolve the bare name "localstack". Two working setups: • Put StandardNotesServer and this container on the SAME user-defined Docker network and give this container the network alias "localstack" (Unraid: Advanced → Network alias). Docker's embedded DNS (127.0.0.11) will then resolve the name. • Or, if StandardNotesServer uses a static IP on br0 / macvlan (which bypasses Docker DNS), add to its Extra Parameters: --add-host=localstack:<LocalStack-IP>. Verify from the Unraid host: docker exec StandardNotesServer getent hosts localstack Output must be non-empty before connecting any client.
Notes: • Restricted to SERVICES=sns,sqs to keep the footprint small. • Port 4566 is exposed on the bridge network so the server container can reach it; you do NOT need to publish it to the host. • The container is started with --hostname=localstack so its own kernel hostname matches the name upstream code expects. That alone is not enough for cross-container resolution — see the HOSTNAME RESOLUTION block above for what DNS / extra-hosts has to be in place on the StandardNotesServer side.

Config.Name: LocalStack Edge Port
Config.Description: Edge port that exposes the SNS / SQS endpoints. Reachable from the Standard Notes server container on the same bridge network. Publishing to the host is optional.

Config.Name: Services (SERVICES)
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of LocalStack services to start. Standard Notes only uses SNS and SQS.

Config.Name: External Hostname (HOSTNAME_EXTERNAL)
Config.Description: Hostname LocalStack advertises to other containers. Leave at 'localstack' — the upstream standardnotes/server image hard-codes the hostname 'localstack' for SNS / SQS. To make the name actually resolve from StandardNotesServer, place both containers on the same user-defined Docker network with this container aliased as 'localstack', OR add --add-host=localstack:<LocalStack-IP> to StandardNotesServer's Extra Parameters when running on br0 / macvlan. Verify with: docker exec StandardNotesServer getent hosts localstack (must return a non-empty line).

Config.Name: Log Level (LS_LOG)
Config.Description: LocalStack log level: trace, debug, info, warn, error.
